intro: Begin your journey by understanding the application entry point and tracing how the dependency injection system wires the core modules, controllers, and services together.

steps.reason: This is the entry point of the application where the NestJS runtime is initialized.
This file acts as the root module, defining the main structure and exported dependencies of the application.
This layer handles incoming HTTP requests and delegates logic to the application services.
This service contains the core business logic used throughout the application.
